name: Google Jamboard
description: Discontinued Google collaborative digital whiteboard for in-room and remote teams, integrated with Google Workspace.

years.notes: Launch-era logomark cropped from the original gsuite.google.com 197x66 lockup (logomark left, 'Jamboard' wordmark right). Three flush opaque shapes forming a J: dark-orange top square, mid-orange middle square, yellow bottom circle. Normalized to a 24x24 viewBox via translate(3.8165 -0.1101) scale(0.367) over the native 44x66 logomark bounds; the gray wordmark was dropped.

Workspace-era refresh adopting Google's translucent-overlay product-icon language: yellow circle body, dark-orange top square, lighter-orange middle overlay simulating the J. Identical mark was live on gstatic.com from early 2018 through the December 2024 shutdown. Wikimedia source 102x150 normalized to 24x24 via translate(3.84 0) scale(0.16).
